selection_without_outcomes.economic_reason: a month-over-month rise in the official 10-year Treasury yield raises the equity discount rate and maps the sleeve to cash; unchanged or falling yields map to SPY

signal.series: Federal Reserve H.15 DGS10 observations preserved through official ALFRED real-time-period history
signal.selection: latest non-null nonsynthetic DGS10 observation available_at_conservative no later than 20:05 America/New_York on the final accepted XNYS session of the month; ties order by observation_date descending, realtime_start descending, row_hash ascending
signal.comparison: within each split compare the current monthly selection with the immediately preceding monthly selection
signal.target_rule: current DGS10 yield less than or equal to previous DGS10 yield means SPY weight 1.0; a positive monthly yield change means SPY weight 0.0 and inactive cash
signal.split_baseline: the first execution point in each split supplies only the preceding monthly selection; the first traded interval begins at the second execution point
signal.missing_rule: fail closed; no interpolation, smoothing, persistence requirement, alternate maturity, current revised history, threshold grid or source fusion

timing_and_account.signal_freeze: 20:05 America/New_York on the final accepted XNYS session of the signal month
timing_and_account.target_submission: 09:00 America/New_York on the next accepted XNYS session
timing_and_account.holding: until the following monthly accepted execution open
timing_and_account.decision_price: raw SPY close on the preceding accepted signal session, available before target submission
timing_and_account.benchmark: buy-and-hold SPY over identical selected split endpoints with identical whole-share, cost, calendar, lifecycle and corporate-action accounting

splits.cross_boundary_rule: no signal or portfolio state carries across splits

gates: strategy terminal net wealth strictly above SPY
arithmetic mean paired monthly active return strictly positive
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than SPY
validation.failure_rule: holdout remains unopened and the lineage closes permanently

gates: strategy terminal net wealth strictly above SPY
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than SPY
uncentered type-7 0.0001953125 lower bound strictly positive

bootstrap.method: paired circular moving-block bootstrap over monthly active returns
bootstrap.p_value: (1 + centered-null means at least observed mean)/(10000 + 1)
bootstrap.limitation: the frozen three-month block is an outcome-blind dependence assumption, not proof that all serial dependence is covered

source_identities.spy_bundle_reuse_boundary: only execution, calendar, lifecycle, corporate-action and price identities are reused; all embedded C3 policy-state values are ignored and cannot affect this signal
source_identities.runner_role: branch-only removable one-use research adapter; not shared infrastructure
